mnemonics: MIPS - Message Passing Between Inter-Process Systems
MTLS - Master Threading and Locking System
keyPoints: Interprocess Communication (IPC) is a technique to enable communication between multiple processes
Multi-threaded Programming is a technique where multiple threads are executed concurrently in a single process
Overview of Interprocess Communication in Multi-threaded Programming involves using synchronization mechanisms, shared memory, and message passing to coordinate the actions of multiple threads
